nasb.text: Then you will see this, and your heart will be glad, And your bones will flourish like the new grass; And the hand of the Lord will be made known to His servants, But He will be indignant toward His enemies.

esv.text: You shall see, and your heart shall rejoice; your bones shall flourish like the grass; and the hand of the Lord shall be known to his servants, and he shall show his indignation against his enemies.

cnv.text: 你們看見了，就心裡快樂， 你們的骨頭必像嫩草一樣長起來， 耶和華的手必向他的僕人顯現， 他必向他的仇敵發怒。

ccb.text: 你们见到这些事，必满心欢喜， 身体如青草一样充满活力。 耶和华必向祂的仆人彰显大能， 向祂的仇敌发怒。

csbs.text: 那时，你们看见了就心里欢喜， 你们的骨头必像嫩草一样兴盛； 耶和华的手必向他的仆人们显明， 他必对他的仇敌恼怒。
